prompt: A highly detailed anime illustration of a seated young woman in an elegant Japanese-inspired fantasy kimono composition, centered on a clean warm off-white background. She has long straight black with deep blue-violet undertones hair with blunt bangs and very long flowing side lengths, with red and blue ribbon strands woven through the hair. Her eyes are large and luminous crimson red, and her expression is calm, soft, and slightly wistful. She wears an ornate floral hairpiece on the right side of her head made of 4 major blossoms in red, white, pale blue, and blue, with dangling gold ornaments and tassels. Her outfit is a richly patterned kimono in red, black, pale blue, cream, and touches of purple, covered in cherry blossoms, stylized flowers, butterflies, cords, bows, and hanging tassel decorations. The sleeves are oversized and flowing, with visible red cord knots and floral appliqué details. She sits in a graceful curled pose with one hand near her face, bare legs prominently visible, wearing white tabi-like socks and elaborate red-and-black platform sandals with bows. Surrounding her are exactly 4 cats: 1 black cat sitting on a branch at left looking upward, and 3 white cats placed around her lower left, mid-right, and lower center-right. Include exactly 2 birds: 1 blue bird perched on the left branch and 1 small red-and-blue bird nestled among flowers at the lower right. Include exactly 3 butterflies: 2 near the upper left and 1 near the lower center by her legs. Frame the composition with plum blossom branches, hanging Japanese ornaments, tassels, diamond charms, and long fabric streamers. Add a large circular decorative motif behind her upper body and a tall vertical banner-like ornament on the right side. The overall palette should balance vermilion red, black, ivory, pale cyan, sky blue, and lavender. Style is polished 2D anime key visual, ultra-clean linework, delicate textile patterning, flat decorative shapes mixed with subtle shading, elegant negative space, highly ornamental but harmonized composition, whimsical and refined, vertical full-body character poster.
